divergences.claim: totalDeadlineMs(perAttemptMs) returns perAttemptMs * 3 (a request gets three attempts). The default per-attempt timeout is 30000 ms, so totalDeadlineMs() called with no argument returns 90000 ms — the default total request deadline.
divergences.prose: totalDeadlineMs(perAttemptMs) returns perAttemptMs * 3 (a request gets three attempts). The default per-attempt timeout is 30000 ms, so totalDeadlineMs() called with no argument returns 90000 ms — the default total request deadline.
